files.00_Overview.md: Add Learning Objectives section, expand 'ทำไมสำคัญ' into formal Why section, add Key Takeaways. The 3W framework is partially there but needs explicit sectioning. Missing mathematical notation for template structure.
files.01_Introduction.md: Rewrite to follow 3W: What is GeometricField (good), Why use it (weak - only 'Why Not Arrays' table), How to use (present but scattered). Add Learning Objectives at top. Add Key Takeaways at end. The 'ทำไมต้องเรียนบทนี้?' block should be formalized into 'Why' section.
files.02_Design_Philosophy.md: Strong content but lacks Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways. The 'ทำมา' motivation is implied but not explicit. Add 'Why This Design' section explaining the rationale. Template structure section should be merged with inheritance hierarchy concepts.
files.03_Inheritance_Hierarchy.md: Good 3W balance but missing Learning Objectives. The hierarchy is well-explained but could benefit from a 'Why This Matters for Debugging' subsection. Add Key Takeaways. Memory management section is too brief - expand.
files.04_Field_Lifecycle.md: Clear What/How but weak Why. Add 'Why Lifecycle Management Matters' section explaining consequences of getting it wrong. Missing Learning Objectives. Time management coverage is good but oldTime vs prevIter distinction needs clearer explanation. Add Key Takeaways.
files.05_Mathematical_Type_Theory.md: Excellent technical depth but missing pedagogical framework. Add Learning Objectives ('สามารถคำนวณ strain rate, vorticity ได้'). Add 'Why Math Theory Matters' showing practical CFD applications. Key Takeaways should summarize operations. Transformation rules section needs more explanation.
files.06_Common_Pitfalls.md: Best file in the folder - has explicit motivation/importance. Add Learning Objectives. The 'Debugging Checklist' is good but should be 'Key Takeaways'. Template errors section is truncated. Each pitfall should have 'How to Prevent' subsection.
files.07_Summary_and_Exercises.md: Exercises lack 'ทำมา' context. Add 'Why These Exercises Build Real Skills' explaining how each maps to actual OpenFOAM development. Add Learning Objectives. Exercises need 'Expected Output' or 'Validation Criteria' so learners can self-check. Summary is too brief - expand with interconnected concepts map.

global_strategy: This folder has solid technical content but inconsistent 3W framework application. Apply systematic refactoring: (1) Add '🎯 Learning Objectives' at top of every file using Thai+English dual format, (2) Formalize 'ทำมา/Why' sections with concrete CFD consequences, (3) Add '🔑 Key Takeaways' at end of every file, (4) Standardize section naming conventions across files, (5) Ensure mathematical notation uses consistent formatting, (6) Add visual learning elements (flowcharts, tables) to every file, (7) Cross-reference sections should point to specific line numbers, (8) Expand truncated sections, especially in file 06. Files 00-03 form a conceptual cluster (should be tightly integrated), files 04-06 form a practical cluster (implementation focus), file 7 needs to be comprehensive capstone.
